title: FinTech Innovators closes pre-seed round
body: FinTech Innovators secured its pre-seed financing to expand the engineering team and accelerate the AI reconciliation engine.

title: FinTech Innovators ships v0.9 reconciliation engine
body: A major technical milestone: the reconciliation engine now processes SME ledgers 40% faster.

title: EduTech Platform partners with regional school district
body: EduTech Platform signed a pilot partnership covering 12 public schools.

title: Nanuhm opens Spring 2026 startup exhibition
body: Applications are now open for the Spring exhibition cohort. Ecosystem-wide announcement.
